AnubisWrathPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_15_Payout6_4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
AnubisWrathPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_16_Payout6_5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
AnubisWrathPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_17_Payout1_1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
AnubisWrathPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_18_Payout1_2: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.
AnubisWrathPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: At the start of any spin, the Multiplier Reel will reveal multipliers between x3 to x500 in every reel.
AnubisWrathPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: At any spin, if there is 1 or more Anubis symbol on any reel, the corresponding multiplier on that reel will be activated and will remain activated until the end of the spin.
AnubisWrathPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_3_Payout2_3: At the end of every spin, if there is 1 or more activated multiplier in the Multiplier Reel, the total win of the spin will be multiplied by the sum of the activated multipliers.
AnubisWrathPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 15 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 3 more free spins.
AnubisWrathPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_2_Payout3_2: Any multipliers awarded during any free spin will be added and will remain at the bottom of the reels until the end of the Free Spins Feature.
AnubisWrathPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_3_Payout3_3: At the end of every free spin, if there is 1 or more activated multiplier in the Multiplier Reel, the total win of that spin will be multiplied by the sum of the activated multipliers and the total multiplier at the bottom of the reels.
AnubisWrathPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_1_Payout4_1: The maximum win amount is %{10000}x of the bet amount.
AnubisWrathPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_2_Payout4_2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{10000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.

AnubisWrathRule.Rule1_1: Anubis Wrath is a 5-reel, 4-rows video slot featuring Multiplier Reel with multipliers up to x500.
AnubisWrathRule.Rule1_2: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{1024} ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
AnubisWrathRule.Rule1_21: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
